title: Attachment Analysis
overview: Phishing emails often deliver malware through attachments. Proper analysis helps identify malicious behavior, understand payloads, and trace attacker intent.

study.overview: Phishing emails often deliver malware through attachments. Proper analysis helps identify malicious behavior, understand payloads, and trace attacker intent.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.

importantCommands.code:
sha256sum file
sha1sum file
md5sum file

Get-FileHash file.docx              # Default SHA256
Get-FileHash file.docx -Algorithm MD5
Get-FileHash file.docx -Algorithm SHA1
